# CampusAI
> Official 2026 JAMB News, Admission Intelligence & Live AI Chat Support portal for prospective higher education students in Nigeria.

CampusAI provides real-time admission guidance for prospective Nigerian university students, helping them navigate complex admission requirements and post-UTME processes through AI-driven tools.

## Capabilities
- **Admission Strategist**: Calculate target aggregate scores, estimate realistic tuition costs, and compare catchment area cutoff quotas.
- **AI Admissions Assistant**: Interactive live support chat for JAMB, Post-UTME, and NUC policies.
- **News Aggregator**: Curated news for Nigerian education (JAMB, ASUU, Scholarships, Jobs).
- **Resources**: Calculator for aggregates (UNILAG, FUTA, LASU, etc.), institution-specific policies.

## Key Endpoints
- [Dashboard](https://campusai.com.ng/): Central portal for aggregate calculation, fee estimating, and quota comparison.
- [AI Chat](https://campusai.com.ng/chat): Direct access to the live AI admission assistant.
- [Post-UTME Hub](https://campusai.com.ng/postutme): Curated admission guidance and news updates.

## Data Sources
- Official University portals (.edu.ng)
- JAMB CAPS Guidelines
- Official Nigerian newspaper reports
